sourcesContent:
import { ChartOptions } from './widgets.model';

/**
 * Series Data
 */
function generateData(count: number, yrange: { max: number; min: number; }) {
    var i = 0;
    var series = [];
    while (i < count) {
        var x = "w" + (i + 1).toString();
        var y =
            Math.floor(Math.random() * (yrange.max - yrange.min + 1)) + yrange.min;

        series.push({
            x: x,
            y: y
        });
        i++;
    }
    return series;
}
